content.text:
## 🎓 Exam Planning Report

### Recommended Certification(s)

- **Exam code & name**: AZ-104: Microsoft Azure Administrator
- **Official exam page**: [AZ-104 Exam Details](https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/credentials/certifications/exams/az-104)
- **Why it fits**: The student has demonstrated readiness in managing Azure resources, identities, storage, compute, and networking, which aligns perfectly with the AZ-104 exam's focus on Azure administration.
- **Prerequisites**: Practical experience with Azure administration tasks including managing Azure identities, governance, storage, virtual machines, and networks; familiarity with PowerShell, Azure CLI, Azure portal, and ARM templates.

### Exam Registration Steps
1. Create or log in to your Microsoft account at https://learn.microsoft.com
2. Visit the AZ-104 certification page linked above.
3. Click the "Schedule exam" button and select either Pearson VUE or Certiport as the exam provider.
4. Choose your preferred mode: online proctored exam (take it from home or office) or in-person at a test center.
5. Register for the exam and pay the exam fee. Check if you are eligible for any Microsoft discount vouchers or your organization’s ESI vouchers.

### Final Preparation Checklist (2 weeks before exam)
- [ ] Complete all Microsoft Learn learning paths and modules for AZ-104.
- [ ] Take the official free practice assessment available here: [Practice Assessment](https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/credentials/certifications/azure-administrator/practice/assessment?assessment-type=practice&assessmentId=21&practice-assessment-type=certification)
- [ ] Review the skills measured document thoroughly to ensure you cover all exam topics: [Skills Measured](https://learn.microsoft.com/credentials/certifications/resources/study-guides/az-104#skills-measured-as-of-april-18,-2025)
- [ ] Join the Microsoft Learn community and Azure forums for last-minute study tips and peer support.
- [ ] Get a good night's sleep before the exam day to ensure you are rested and focused.

### Useful Links (retrieved via Microsoft Learn)
- [Study Guide for AZ-104 Exam](https://learn.microsoft.com/credentials/certifications/resources/study-guides/az-104#purpose-of-this-document)
- [Microsoft Azure Administrator Certification Overview](https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/credentials/certifications/azure-administrator/)
- [Microsoft Learn Community - Azure Administrator](https://techcommunity.microsoft.com/t5/microsoft-learn/ct-p/MicrosoftLearn)

---

You have passed your readiness assessment and are fully prepared for the AZ-104 exam. Good luck! You are set to become a Microsoft Certified: Azure Administrator Associate — an important credential that recognizes your expertise and advances your career. Go confidently!
